📋 *Weekly PR Digest — March 29 to April 05, 2026*
_30 PRs merged in `microsoft/vscode`_

  • <https://github.com/microsoft/vscode/pull/307877|#307877> Sessions - add a resize observer to the title to match the width of the chat part — _lszomoru_
    _<!-- Thank you for submitting a Pull Request._
  • <https://github.com/microsoft/vscode/pull/307732|#307732> agentHost: Enable local agent host in sessions app — _roblourens_
    _Co-authored-by: Copilot <copilot@github.com>_
  • <https://github.com/microsoft/vscode/pull/307726|#307726> Let new browser tabs outlive their parents — _kycutler_
    _Fixes #297619_
  • <https://github.com/microsoft/vscode/pull/307692|#307692> sessions: disable branch picker in folder mode — _hawkticehurst_
    _## Summary
- keep the new chat branch picker visible when isolation mode switches from Worktree to Folder
- disable the._
  • <https://github.com/microsoft/vscode/pull/307678|#307678> chat: add startup telemetry for live chat model counts — _roblourens_
    _After reviving sessions with pending edits at startup, fire a `chat.modelsAtStartup` telemetry event with:_

🐛 *Bug Fixes* (10)
  • <https://github.com/microsoft/vscode/pull/307846|#307846> fix: agents launch from cli on windows — _deepak1556_
    _Fixes https://github.com/microsoft/vscode/issues/305216_
  • <https://github.com/microsoft/vscode/pull/307834|#307834> Fix: close window after generating default keybindings — _ntrogh_
    _Close window instead of ending all Electron instances after generating default keybindings with._
  • <https://github.com/microsoft/vscode/pull/307780|#307780> Ignore file-like domain suffixes in terminal sandbox — _dileepyavan_
    _## Summary
- ignore hostname matches whose final label looks like a common file extension when normalizing candidate._
  • <https://github.com/microsoft/vscode/pull/307728|#307728> Browser: don't show a loading spinner for in-page navigation — _kycutler_
    _Fixes #291218_
  • <https://github.com/microsoft/vscode/pull/307715|#307715> Agent Debug Panel: pagination, incremental filtering, and service optimizations — _vijayupadya_
    _Improves performance and responsiveness of the Agent Debug Panel for large sessions, preparing for upcoming JSONL-backed event streaming._
  • <https://github.com/microsoft/vscode/pull/298074|#298074> Fix: Clicking settings link in bool setting description incorrectly toggles the checkbox — _Copilot_
    _Clicking a link in a boolean setting's description (e.g., the `chat.autoReply` link in `chat.tools.global.autoApprove`) both navigated to the linked setting **and** toggled the checkbox._
  • <https://github.com/microsoft/vscode/pull/307721|#307721> agentHost: fix editing — _connor4312_
    _Some old bad logic here caught up to us

<!-- Thank you for submitting a Pull Request._
  • <https://github.com/microsoft/vscode/pull/307684|#307684> Sessions: preserve cancelled session content in list — _osortega_
    _## Problem

When a session was stopped before the agent committed a worktree, it was removed from the sessions list entirely._
  • <https://github.com/microsoft/vscode/pull/303606|#303606> agentPlugins: clone locally when in a remote — _connor4312_
    _The git extension runs on the remote side, so it's not suitable to use to clone._
  • <https://github.com/microsoft/vscode/pull/307544|#307544> Remove debug event attachments — _pwang347_
    _<!-- Thank you for submitting a Pull Request._

🔧 *Refactors* (6)
  • <https://github.com/microsoft/vscode/pull/307843|#307843> Sessions - cleanup context keys — _lszomoru_
    _<!-- Thank you for submitting a Pull Request._
  • <https://github.com/microsoft/vscode/pull/307836|#307836> Sessions - changes view cleanup — _lszomoru_
    _<!-- Thank you for submitting a Pull Request._
  • <https://github.com/microsoft/vscode/pull/307831|#307831> fix: safestorage keychain for renamed agents app — _deepak1556_
    _Followup to https://github.com/microsoft/vscode-distro/pull/1380_
  • <https://github.com/microsoft/vscode/pull/307727|#307727> sessions: use generic sign out confirmation copy — _hawkticehurst_
    _## Summary

Fixes #307465._
  • <https://github.com/microsoft/vscode/pull/307694|#307694> Sessions - more cleanup around state management — _lszomoru_
    _<!-- Thank you for submitting a Pull Request._
  • <https://github.com/microsoft/vscode/pull/307643|#307643> Remove chat.statusWidget.anonymous setting — _cwebster-99_
    _**Configuration changes:**_

🧪 *Tests* (8)
  • <https://github.com/microsoft/vscode/pull/307783|#307783> Clarify sandbox-first guidance for terminal tool unsandboxing — _dileepyavan_
    _Fixes #304596

This updates the run-in-terminal tool guidance so models are told to execute commands in sandbox mode._
  • <https://github.com/microsoft/vscode/pull/307777|#307777> Prefer terminal presentation overrides in chat text — _dileepyavan_
    _## Summary
- prefer `presentationOverrides.commandLine` when terminal tool invocations are stringified into chat._
  • <https://github.com/microsoft/vscode/pull/307736|#307736> agentHost: Ensure all tests use an in-memory db to reduce flakiness — _roblourens_
    _Co-authored-by: Copilot <copilot@github.com>

<!-- Thank you for submitting a Pull Request._
  • <https://github.com/microsoft/vscode/pull/307740|#307740> Revert chatEditingSession change — _roblourens_
    _From #304603 since it leads to not rendering parallel edits from Copilot CLI correctly

Co-authored-by: Copilot <copilot@github.com>

<!-- Thank you for submitting a Pull Request._
  • <https://github.com/microsoft/vscode/pull/307699|#307699> agentHost: Validate strings in bash commands — _roblourens_
    _Co-authored-by: Copilot <copilot@github.com>

<!-- Thank you for submitting a Pull Request._
  • <https://github.com/microsoft/vscode/pull/307734|#307734> Snapshot browser state before disposal — _kycutler_
    _Fixes #307731_
  • <https://github.com/microsoft/vscode/pull/307709|#307709> sessions: reduce left sidebar minimum width — _hawkticehurst_
    _## Summary

Lowers the sessions app left sidebar minimum width from `270px` to `170px` so it can be resized narrower._
  • <https://github.com/microsoft/vscode/pull/307677|#307677> agentHost: archive and store archive state for remote agent host sessions — _roblourens_
    _<!-- Thank you for submitting a Pull Request._

🏗️ *Maintenance* (1)
  • <https://github.com/microsoft/vscode/pull/307711|#307711> sessions: show branch in active session title — _hawkticehurst_
    _## Summary

Updates the sessions titlebar widget so active session titles render as:

`{Title} · {repo name} ({git branch/worktree name})`

when branch/worktree metadata is available._
